Budget Forecast 2024: The preliminary 2024 operating budget projects total revenue of $102 million, reflecting 12% growth over 2023 actuals. Headcount is expected to grow from 214 to 248 employees, adding approximately $7.2 million in personnel costs. Capital expenditure for the year is budgeted at $4.5 million, primarily for data center upgrades and office expansion. Finance will present the final board-approved budget at the January all-hands meeting.
